meta.name: slide-deck-generator
meta.title: Slide Deck Generator
meta.description: Turn a video into a markdown slide deck by pairing ffmpeg keyframes with overlapping Whisper transcript chunks.

inputs.name: video
inputs.description: Source video — audio will be transcribed, keyframes sampled.

inputs.name: interval_sec
inputs.description: Seconds between keyframes. Lower = more slides, higher = denser per-slide text.

outputs.name: deck_zip
outputs.description: ZIP containing deck.md (slide deck) + images/ folder (keyframe JPGs referenced by the markdown).

outputs.name: deck
outputs.description: Markdown slide deck. Each slide = one keyframe image + the transcript chunk overlapping its timestamp.

steps.description: Transcribe audio with Whisper, producing timestamped segments.

hints.reference:
from faster_whisper import WhisperModel
model = WhisperModel('large-v3', device='auto', compute_type='auto')
segments, info = model.transcribe(video_path, word_timestamps=True)

steps.description: Sample one keyframe every 30 seconds with ffmpeg.
For each keyframe at time t, find the transcript segment(s) overlapping t, and emit a markdown slide pairing image + text.

hints.reference:
for kf in keyframes:
    t = kf.timestamp
    chunk = next(s for s in segments if s.start <= t <= s.end)
    write(f'![]({kf.path})

{chunk.text}

---
')
hints.reference_v2:
import zipfile, os
with zipfile.ZipFile('deck.zip','w') as z:
    z.write('deck.md')
    for img in keyframes: z.write(img, f'images/{os.path.basename(img)}')
